title: Lesson 2
subtitle: Is this / Is that / Are these / Are those

items.text: Is this a desk? Yes, it is.
items.chinese: 这是一张课桌吗？是的，它是。

items.text: Is that a table? Yes, it is.
items.chinese: 那是一张桌子吗？是的，它是。

items.text: Are these desks? Yes, they are.
items.chinese: 这些是课桌吗？是的，它们是。

items.text: Are those tables? Yes, they are.
items.chinese: 那些是桌子吗？是的，它们是。

items.text: Is this a table? No, it isn't. It's a desk.
items.chinese: 这是一张桌子吗？不，它不是。它是一张课桌。

items.text: Is that a desk? No, it isn't. It's a table.
items.chinese: 那是一张课桌吗？不，它不是。它是一张桌子。

items.text: Are these tables? No, they aren't. They're desks.
items.chinese: 这些是桌子吗？不，它们不是。它们是课桌。

items.text: Are those desks? No, they aren't. They're tables.
items.chinese: 那些是课桌吗？不，它们不是。它们是桌子。
